title: OMS Predicate v1.0
description: JSON Schema for the OMS predicate body within an in-toto Statement v1. This schema defines only the model-signing-specific predicate; the enclosing in-toto Statement and Sigstore Bundle are governed by their respective specifications.

resources.description: File manifest. Each entry describes one file or byte range in the signing scope, per in-toto Resource Descriptor.

resource_descriptor.description: A single file or byte-range entry in the model manifest.

name.description: For 'files' method: relative POSIX path from the model root. For 'shards' method: 'path:start:end' where start is the inclusive byte offset and end is the exclusive byte offset.

digest.description: Hex-encoded hash of the file or byte-range contents.

algorithm.description: Hash algorithm used to compute the digest.

serialization.description: Canonicalization metadata recording how files were enumerated and hashed.

method.description: Serialization method. 'files' hashes each file as a whole. 'shards' divides files into fixed-size byte ranges.

hash_type.description: Hash algorithm used for all resource digests.

shard_size.description: Shard size in bytes. Required when method is 'shards', must be absent when method is 'files'.

allow_symlinks.description: Whether symbolic links were followed during file enumeration. Support for true is expected to be removed in a future version.

ignore_paths.description: Paths excluded from the signing scope.
